output: {"match_id":"m030","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation with equal pilot signal. B is stronger: it tests cross-turn recall across three prior tool results under explicit social pressure to rerun, requiring direct answers and nuance about provenance. A is realistic but has some ambiguity around “actually live” market data and post-market staleness, making re-query less clearly redundant."}
